name: generate-image
tagline: Wraps a Python script that generates or edits images through OpenRouter (FLUX.2, Gemini image models) using your own API key.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped skill: clear when-to-use / when-not-to-use guidance, documented error handling, and API-key setup that stays local (.env) rather than being sent anywhere but OpenRouter itself. The referenced scripts/generate_image.py was not bundled with this review, so its actual code is unverified — treat that as the main residual trust gap. Minor nit:
